records.question: Which books titled Michael Moorcock's Multiverse are written by Michael Moorcock and have at least 12 issues?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
WHERE book.title = 'Michael Moorcock''s Multiverse' AND book.issues >= 12.0 AND book.writer = 'Michael Moorcock'
records.pred_sql: SELECT book.Book_ID FROM book WHERE book.Title = 'Michael Moorcock' AND book.Issues >= 12.0 AND book.Writer = 'Michael Moorcock'

records.question: Which books titled Bloody Mary : Lady Liberty, written by Garth Ennis with exactly 4 issues, were published by Thomson Reuters in March 2008 and priced at most 6000000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE publication.price <= 6000000.0 AND book.title = 'Bloody Mary : Lady Liberty' AND publication.publication_date = 'March 2008' AND book.issues = 4.0 AND book.writer = 'Garth Ennis' AND publication.publisher = 'Thomson Reuters'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT b.Book_ID
FROM book b
INNER JOIN publication p ON b.Book_ID = p.Book_ID
WHERE b.Title = 'Bloody Mary : Lady Liberty'
AND b.Issues = 4.0
AND b.Writer = 'Garth Ennis'
AND p.Price <= 6000000.0
AND p.Publication_Date = 'March 2008'
AND p.Publisher = 'Thomson Reuters'

records.question: Which books published by Bertelsmann in April 2007 have a price of exactly 2000000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE publication.price = 2000000.0 AND publication.publication_date = 'April 2007' AND publication.publisher = 'Bertelsmann'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.Book_ID
FROM book b
INNER JOIN publication p ON b.Book_ID = p.Book_ID
WHERE p.Price = 2000000.0
AND p.Publication_Date = 'April 2007'
AND p.Publisher = 'Bertelsmann'

records.question: Which books were published by Thomson Reuters?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE publication.publisher = 'Thomson Reuters'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.Book_ID
FROM book b
INNER JOIN publication p ON b.Book_ID = p.Book_ID
WHERE p.Publisher = 'Thomson Reuters'

records.question: Which books titled Dead Corps were written by Christopher Hinz and have at most 4.0 issues?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book

records.pred_sql: SELECT book.Book_ID FROM book WHERE book.Issues <= 4.0 AND book.Writer = 'Christopher Hinz' AND book.Title = 'Dead Corps'

records.question: Which books titled Michael Moorcock's Multiverse published by Pearson in March 2007 have at most 12 issues?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE book.issues <= 12.0 AND publication.publisher = 'Pearson' AND book.title = 'Michael Moorcock''s Multiverse' AND publication.publication_date = 'March 2007'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT b.Book_ID
FROM book b
WHERE b.Issues <= 12.0
AND b.Title = 'Michael Moorcock'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM publication p
  WHERE p.Book_ID = b.Book_ID
  AND p.Publisher = 'Pearson'
  AND p.Publication_Date = 'March 2007'
)

records.question: What books titled The Black Lamb have at least 6 issues?

records.pred_sql: SELECT book.Book_ID FROM book WHERE book.Title = 'The Black Lamb' AND book.Issues >= 6.0

records.question: What books titled Cyberella, written by Howard Chaykin with at most 12 issues, were published by Wiley in October 2005 priced exactly 3000000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE book.writer = 'Howard Chaykin' AND book.issues <= 12.0 AND publication.price = 3000000.0 AND publication.publication_date = 'October 2005' AND publication.publisher = 'Wiley' AND book.title = 'Cyberella'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT b.Book_ID
FROM book b
INNER JOIN publication p ON b.Book_ID = p.Book_ID
WHERE b.Writer = 'Howard Chaykin'
AND b.Issues <= 12.0
AND b.Title = 'Cyberella'
AND p.Price = 3000000.0
AND p.Publication_Date = 'October 2005'
AND p.Publisher = 'Wiley'

records.question: Which books have Howard Chaykin as the writer?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE book.writer = 'Howard Chaykin'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.Book_ID
FROM book b
INNER JOIN publication p ON b.Book_ID = p.Book_ID
WHERE b.Writer = 'Howard Chaykin'
